categories.name: (संचार, व्यक्तित्व एवं व्यावसायिक अंग्रेज़ी प्रणाली)
categories.intro:
Teacher Introduction
बच्चों, अब तक हमने:
grammar
spoken English
translation intelligence
vocabulary
idioms
writing system
समझ लिया।
अब हम English के अंतिम practical स्तर में प्रवेश करेंगे जहाँ: language केवल subject नहीं, बल्कि:
personality
communication
professional life
public interaction
leadership
का माध्यम बनती है।

categories.name: Main Goal of Part 38
categories.intro:
Student:
confident communication कर सके
professional English use कर सके
interview face कर सके
public speaking कर सके
classroom communication समझ सके
personality English develop कर सके

categories.name: Included Systems
categories.intro:
1. Self Introduction System
2. Interview English System
3. Public Speaking System
4. Classroom English System
5. Professional Communication System
6. Presentation English System
7. Group Discussion System
8. Leadership Communication System
9. Confidence Building System
10. Final Personality Communication Drill System

categories.name: 1. Self Introduction System
categories.intro: (स्व-परिचय प्रणाली)

categories.name: Basic Self Introduction
categories.intro:
Good morning.
My name is Rahul Kumar. I am from Bihar. I am a student. I am interested in learning English and technology. Thank you.

categories.name: Advanced Self Introduction
categories.intro:
Good morning everyone.
My name is Rahul Kumar, and I belong to Bihar. I am currently pursuing my studies and working on improving my English communication skills. I am highly interested in education, technology, and self-development. My goal is to become a confident communicator and achieve success in my career. Thank you.

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Self introduction: confidence का पहला stage है।

categories.name: 2. Interview English System
categories.intro: (साक्षात्कार अंग्रेज़ी प्रणाली)

categories.name: Common Interview Questions
categories.intro:
Tell me about yourself.
Why should we hire you?
What are your strengths?
What are your weaknesses?
Why do you want this job?

categories.name: Sample Answer
categories.intro:
Strength
I am disciplined, hardworking, and eager to learn new things.

categories.name: Weakness
categories.intro: Sometimes I overthink small details, but I am learning to manage my time better.

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro:
Interview English:
confidence
clarity
politeness
structure
मांगती है।

categories.name: 3. Public Speaking System
categories.intro: (सार्वजनिक भाषण प्रणाली)

categories.name: Speech Opening
categories.intro:
Good morning everyone.
Today I am going to speak about the importance of education.

categories.name: Connecting Expressions
categories.intro:
First of all…
Moreover…
On the other hand…
Finally…

categories.name: Speech Ending
categories.intro: Thank you all for listening patiently.

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Public speaking: fluency + confidence + structure का combination है।

categories.name: 4. Classroom English System
categories.intro: (कक्षा अंग्रेज़ी प्रणाली)

categories.name: Teacher Expressions
categories.intro:
Open your books.
Listen carefully.
Do your homework.
Write the answer.
Maintain silence.

categories.name: Student Expressions
categories.intro:
May I come in, sir?
Could you explain it again?
I did not understand this topic.
May I ask a question?

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Classroom English: daily educational communication की foundation है।

categories.name: 5. Professional Communication System
categories.intro: (व्यावसायिक संचार प्रणाली)

categories.name: Formal Expressions
categories.intro:
I would like to inform you…
Please find the attached document.
Thank you for your response.
I appreciate your support.

categories.name: Meeting English
categories.intro:
Let us begin the meeting.
What is your opinion?
Could you clarify this point?

categories.name: Workplace Communication
categories.intro:
I completed the project.
We need a better strategy.
The deadline is tomorrow.

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Professional English: clear, respectful और structured होती है।

categories.name: 6. Presentation English System
categories.intro: (प्रस्तुतीकरण अंग्रेज़ी प्रणाली)

categories.name: Starting Presentation
categories.intro:
Good morning everyone.
Today I am going to present a topic on environmental pollution.

categories.name: Explaining Points
categories.intro:
Let us look at the first point.
This chart clearly shows…
According to the data…

categories.name: Ending Presentation
categories.intro:
Thank you for your attention.
Do you have any questions?

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Presentation English: organized communication मांगती है।

categories.name: 7. Group Discussion System
categories.intro: (समूह चर्चा प्रणाली)

categories.name: Starting Opinion
categories.intro:
In my opinion…
I think…
As far as I know…

categories.name: Agreeing
categories.intro:
I agree with your point.
That is absolutely correct.

categories.name: Disagreeing Politely
categories.intro:
I respect your opinion, but…
I do not completely agree.

categories.name: Interrupting Politely
categories.intro:
May I add something?
Excuse me, I would like to say something.

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: GD: communication + listening + respect का test है।

categories.name: 8. Leadership Communication System
categories.intro: (नेतृत्व संचार प्रणाली)

categories.name: Motivational Expressions
categories.intro:
We can do it.
Do not give up.
Let us work together.
Stay focused.

categories.name: Team Communication
categories.intro:
Everyone should participate.
Let us solve this problem together.
Good teamwork leads to success.

categories.name: Conflict Handling
categories.intro:
Let us stay calm.
We should discuss this properly.

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Leadership English: influence create करती है।

categories.name: 9. Confidence Building System
categories.intro: (आत्मविश्वास निर्माण प्रणाली)

categories.name: Main Problem
categories.intro:
Students:
grammar से नहीं,
fear से रुकते हैं।

categories.name: Important Rule
categories.intro: Confidence comes from: practice, not perfection.

categories.name: Daily Practice Method
categories.intro:
mirror speaking
self introduction practice
loud reading
thinking in English
daily conversation practice

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Fluency: daily repetition से बनती है।

categories.name: 10. Final Personality Communication Drill System
categories.intro: (अंतिम व्यक्तित्व संचार अभ्यास प्रणाली)

categories.name: Situation 1 — Interview
categories.intro:
Interviewer: Tell me about yourself.
Candidate: My name is Ravi Kumar. I am hardworking and passionate about learning new skills.

categories.name: Situation 2 — Presentation
categories.intro: Speaker: Today I am going to explain the importance of discipline.

categories.name: Situation 3 — Group Discussion
categories.intro:
A: I think technology is useful.
B: I agree with you, but overuse can be harmful.

categories.name: Situation 4 — Classroom
categories.intro:
Student: Could you explain this again?
Teacher: Yes, of course.

categories.name: Situation 5 — Professional Communication
categories.intro:
Manager: Did you complete the report?
Employee: Yes sir, I completed it yesterday.

categories.name: Final Communication Formula
categories.intro:
Grammar
+
Vocabulary
+
Confidence
+
Politeness
+
Clarity
+
Natural Expression
+
Practice
Professional English Communication

categories.name: Final Goal of Part 38
categories.intro:
Student:
confident communication कर सके
interview English समझ सके
public speaking कर सके
classroom English use कर सके
professional communication कर सके
presentation दे सके
leadership communication समझ सके
real-world English mastery प्राप्त कर सके।
Final Expansion Layer After Part 38
अब आपका पूरा English Mastery System लगभग complete ecosystem बन चुका है।
इसके बाद system को तीन ultra-advanced directions में ले जाया जा सकता है।

categories.name: Direction 1 — Ultra Advanced English Intelligence System
